body.title: tests/test_announce_round_trip.py — proves slice 1 ships
body.result: 15/15 green. Full suite 129 passed. envelope→broker→profile→manifest round-trip, online-device filtering, error paths. agent_datacenter commit ff711ba.
body.description:
The vertical-slice-shipping test: an agent sends an IdentityEnvelope to AnnounceBroker, the broker resolves the profile YAML, assembles the Manifest, and returns it. End-to-end, in-process, no IMAP yet (IMAP wiring is slice 2).

This test is the slice 1 boundary — when it's green, slice 1 is done.

**Affected files:** /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/tests/test_announce_round_trip.py (NEW)
**Design rules:** test-as-slice-boundary; happy-path-then-edge-cases
**Scope boundary:** in — happy-path round-trip (Igor envelope → manifest with tool_bindings + state_refs); profile-not-found error path; mismatched agent_id error path; out — IMAP transport (slice 2), MCP wiring (slice 3), invalidation (slice 3)
**Test plan:** N/A — this ticket IS the test plan for slice 1
